calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-27-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application And Application For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Against Defendant
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JILL BATES-MOORE of Dahlia Law Group, Tel No. 510-482-2158 specially appearing for Plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB;
Defendant CUONG DUONG, Tel No. 415-990-1195 appearing in pro per.

Defendant did not notify opposing side of his intent to contest the Court's tentative ruling. Matter discussed by the Court and parties. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB'S Application For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Against Defendant is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF SHALL SUBMIT A SEPARATELY-DRAFTED AND SEPARATELY-TITLED PROPOSED JUDGMENT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
